patch.description:
Comment attributes you can post:

| Attribute      | Type		     | Required  |
| -------------- |:-------------:| ---------:|
| text	         | text          | yes       |
| commented_id   | integer       | yes       |
| commented_type | string        | yes       |

get.description: Get details of a specific Company.
Get details of a specific Company.

patch.description:
Company attributes you can post:

| Attribute     | Type		    | Required  |
| ------------- |:-------------:| ---------:|
| name	        | string          | yes       |
| description   | text          |         |
| privacy       | json     |         |
| email | string |  |
| phone | string |  |
| street | string |  |
| zip | string |  |
| city | string |  |
| country | string - country code by [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2) |  |
| id_num | string | |
| tax_num | string ||
| website | string ||
| kind | string - value in "legal_entity" or "individual" ||
| vat_payer | boolean ||
| latitude | float ||
| longitude | float ||
| company_type_id | integer ||
| company_status_id | integer ||
| company_phase_id | integer ||
| person | string ||
| target_user_id | integer ||
| record_reason | string ||
| file_number | string ||

get.description: Get details of a specific Contact.
Get details of a specific Contact.
Get details of a specific Contract.

Optional query parameters:

| **Name** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| type | type of elements (e.g. TaskStatus, TaskType, ProjectStatus, etc.) |
Get details of a specific Element.

patch.description:
Element attributes you can patch:

| Attribute | Type | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| name | string | yes |
| type | string | yes |
| default | boolean |  |
| color | string |  |
| currency | string | available only for type 'RateType' |
| hour_rate | float | available only for type 'RateType' |
| expense_hour_rate | float | available only for type 'RateType' |

get.description: Get details of a specific EmailConnection.
Get details of a specific EmailFolder.
Get details of a specific EmailMessage.
Get details of a specific EmailMessage.
Get details of a specific EmailMessage.
Get details of a specific Event.
Get details of a specific Filter.
Get details of a specific Form.
Get details of a specific HourRate.

patch.description:
Hour rates attributes you can post:

| Attribute | Type | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| user_id | integer | yes |
| start_date | date |  |
| end_date | date |  |
| expense | float | yes |
| income | float | yes |

get.description: Get details of a specific InventoryRecord.

patch.description:
Inventory record attributes you can post:

| Attribute | Type | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| product_id | integer - ID of product | yes |
| kind | string - value in "add" or "remove" | yes |
| amount | float | yes |
| datetime | string - date format "YYYY-MM-DD" | yes |
| price | float |  |
| purchase_price | float |  |
| currency | string - value from available currencies |  |
| company_id | integer |  |
| project_id | integer |  |
| user_id | integer |  |
| product_store_id | integer - ID of product_store |  |
| source_product_store_id | integer - ID of product_store |  |
| product_comment | string |  |
| privacy | json |  |

get.description: Get details of a specific Invoice.

patch.description:
Invoice attributes you can post:

| Attribute | Type | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| name | string | yes |
| description | text |  |
| after_paid | string \[create_invoice, send_taxdoc\] |  |
| after_paid_auto_send | boolean |  |

get.description: Get details of a specific JobLog.
Get details of a specific Milestone.
Get details of a specific Milestone.
Get details of a specific Note.
Get details of a specific Notification.

Get details of a specific ProductSet.
Get details of a specific Product.

patch.description:
Product attributes you can post:

| Attribute | Type | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| name | string | yes |
| code | string |  |
| ean | string |  |
| price | float |  |
| purchase_price | float |  |
| currency | string - value from available currencies |  |
| unit | string |  |
| company_id | integer |  |
| track_inventory | boolean |  |
| inventory | float | required if track_inventory = true |
| vat_rate_id | integer - ID of Vat rate |  |
| description | string |  |
| record_reason | string |  |
| privacy | json |  |

get.description: Get details of a specific ProjectHourRate.

patch.description:
Project Hour rates attributes you can post:

| Attribute | Type | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| user_id | integer | yes |
| project_id | integer | yes |
| start_date | date |  |
| end_date | date |  |
| expense | float | yes |
| income | float | yes |

get.description: Get details of a specific Project.
Get details of a specific Project.

patch.description:
Project attributes you can post:

| Attribute     | Type		    | Required  |
| ------------- |:-------------:| ---------:|
| name	        | string          | yes       |
| description   | text          |         |
| priority | string - value in "low", "middle", "high", "critical" ||
| order_number | string ||
| planned_hours | float ||
| planned_incomes | float ||
| planned_expenses | float ||
| currency | string - value from available currencies ||
| start_date | string - date format "YYYY-MM-DD" ||
| end_date | string - date format "YYYY-MM-DD" ||
| finished | boolean ||
| project_type_id | integer ||
| project_status_id | integer ||
| company_id | integer ||
| company_ids | json - array of integers ||
| user_id | integer ||
| user_ids | json - array of integers ||
| privacy       | json     |         |

delete.description:
Project attributes you can post:

| Attribute | Type | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| name | string | yes |
| description | text |  |
| priority | string - value in "low", "middle", "high", "critical" |  |
| record_reason | string |  |
| order_number | string |  |
| planned_hours | float |  |
| planned_incomes | float |  |
| planned_expenses | float |  |
| currency | string - value from available currencies |  |
| start_date | string - date format "YYYY-MM-DD" |  |

| finished | boolean |  |
| hours | float |  |

| company_id | integer |  |
| company_ids | json - array of integers |  |
| user_id | integer |  |

Get details of a specific Task.

patch.description:
Task attributes you can post:

| Attribute | Type | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| name | string | yes |
| description | text |  |
| priority | string - value in "low", "middle", "high", "critical" |  |
| record_reason | string |  |
| planned_hours | float |  |
| planned_incomes | float |  |
| planned_expenses | float |  |
| currency | string - value from available currencies |  |
| start_time | string - datetime format by [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) |  |
| end_time | string - datetime format by [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) |  |
| finished | boolean |  |
| hours | float |  |
| progress | float - range 0 to 100 |  |
| task_type_id | integer |  |
| task_status_id | integer |  |
| company_id | integer |  |
| project_id | integer |  |
| user_id | integer |  |
| target_user_id | integer |  |
| company_ids | json - array of integers |  |
| user_ids | json - array of integers |  |
| privacy | json |  |
| user_budget_allocations | json |  |

get.description: Get details of a specific Timesheet.

patch.description:
Timesheet attributes you can post:

| Attribute     | Type		    | Required  |
| ------------- |:-------------:| ---------:|
| name	        | string          | yes       |
| start_time | string - datetime format by [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) |yes|
| end_time | string - datetime format by [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) |yes|
| hours | float | yes |
| unit | string | |
| rate_type_id | integer - "-2" for fixed value, "-1" for custom rate | yes |
| value | float ||
| currency | string - value from available currencies ||
| description | text ||
| status | string - value in "novice", "to_approve", "to_invoice", "invoiced" or "paid" ||
| approved | string - value in "waiting", "yess", "noo" ||
| record_reason | string ||
| work_type_id | integer ||
| user_id | integer ||
| company_id | integer ||
| project_id | integer ||
| task_id | integer ||
| transfer_id | integer ||

delete.description:
Timesheet attributes you can post:

| Attribute     | Type		    | Required  |
| ------------- |:-------------:| ---------:|
| name	        | string          | yes       |
| start_time | string - datetime format by [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) |yes|
| end_time | string - datetime format by [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) |yes|
| hours | float | yes |
| unit | string | |
| rate_type_id | integer - "-2" for fixed value, "-1" for custom rate | yes |
| value | float ||
| currency | string - value from available currencies ||
| description | text ||
| status | string - value in "novice", "to_approve", "to_invoice", "invoiced" or "paid" ||
| approved | string - value in "waiting", "yess", "noo" ||
| record_reason | string ||
| work_type_id | integer ||
| user_id | integer ||
| company_id | integer ||
| project_id | integer ||
| task_id | integer ||
| transfer_id | integer ||

post.description:
Create single file upload with multipart form request.

Create single file upload.

File can be uploaded in 3 ways:

1. by providng multipart form attachmet`file`
    
2. by providing `url`
    
3. by providing `base64` with `filename`

get.description: Get details of a specific Upload.
Get list of the users authenticated user can see. Note that there are fictive users also.
Get details of a specific VatRate.
Get details of a specific WorkflowCause.
Get list of the accounts user has access to.

post.description:
[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Basic_access_authentication](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Basic_access_authentication)

Example of creating hash value in JavaScript:

``` javascript
const email = 'your@email.com'
const password = 'yourPassword'
const hash = btoa(`${email}:${password}`)

 ```

parameters.name: otp
parameters.description: If you have enabled 2-factor authentication provide one time password (the 6 digits code).
